query:
UPDATE student_syllabus_techniques
             SET hidden_at = ?, hidden_by_id = ?, updated_at = ?
             WHERE technique_id = ?
               AND hidden_at IS NULL
               AND assignment_id IN (
                   SELECT id FROM syllabus_assignments
                   WHERE syllabus_id = ?
                     AND unassigned_at IS NULL
                     AND graduated_at IS NULL
               )
